finding_results.notes: Compressed the opening to one emblematic family-infrastructure comparison, sharpened Tiana's dorm hunger into a privacy claim tied to home pressure, and turned the schedule's room-214 line into the explicit hinge into the aid-office scene.

Reduced the Malik scene to a single summary of the aid problem, then added fresh pressure around whether Tiana tells Marcia, how she confronts Delroy, and what exit she has if he starts performing instead of answering.

pass_summaries.summary: The revision tightens chapter architecture by moving the opening cleanly toward room 214 and repurposes the Malik aftermath into a new leverage scene rather than a polished recap of the aid-office damage.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=2, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
